nationality.source: The defendant was born in Guangzhou in July 1956 and is 68.

age_at_offence.source: The defendant was born in Guangzhou in July 1956 and is 68.

age_at_sentencing.source: The defendant was born in Guangzhou in July 1956 and is 68.

gender.source: The defendant claimed under caution that the 'pork' (colloquial term for methamphetamine) and 'weed' (colloquial term for cannabis) were for his own consumption, and he would sometimes share them with his friends.

parental_status.source: The defendant contributes about RMB800 towards his daughter’s living expenses, who is 18 years old and studying nursing in Guangzhou.

health_conditions.name: Drug addiction
health_conditions.source: At the time of sentencing, the applicant was a former drug abuser aged 68, with 20 previous convictions, for which he has served more than 20 years in prison as follows

health_conditions.name: Cardiac disease; diabetes; kidney problems; hernia; polyps; underwent angioplasty
health_conditions.source: The defendant suffers from cardiac disease, diabetes, kidney problems, hernia and polyps. He had undergone angioplasty procedure during his remand.

occupation.source: The defendant was working as a construction site worker in 2015, earning around $30,000, when he suffered a hand injury forcing him to stop.

monthly_wage.source: He had to rely on CSSA of $5,300 per month for his daily and medical expenses since 2017.

government_subsidy_recipient.source: He had to rely on CSSA of $5,300 per month for his daily and medical expenses since 2017.

criminal_records.source: At the time of sentencing, the applicant was a former drug abuser aged 68, with 20 previous convictions, for which he has served more than 20 years in prison as follows
His last conviction was on 2 October 2019, when he was sentenced to 18 months’ imprisonment for possession of dangerous drugs.

positive_habits_after_arrest.source: He has since quit his drug use and plans to be reunited with his daughter in the mainland upon release, and to never return to Hong Kong.

family_supports.source: The defendant contributes about RMB800 towards his daughter’s living expenses, who is 18 years old and studying nursing in Guangzhou.
